response:
* The abstract discusses the role of astrocytic coverage in glutamate clearance and synaptic transmission.  
* It mentions that reduced astrocytic coverage leads to impaired glutamate clearance.  
* This reduction affects transmitter release via metabotropic glutamate receptors.  
* The title highlights the control of glutamate clearance and synaptic efficacy by glial coverage.  
* The abstract directly supports the title's claim about glial coverage influencing synaptic efficacy.  
* *highlighted section* The key finding aligns with the title's assertion about glial coverage regulating synaptic function.  
* The study was conducted in the rat hypothalamic supraoptic nucleus.  
* The findings suggest astrocytes modulate synaptic efficacy through glutamate clearance.  
* The title accurately reflects the main conclusion of the abstract.
